trigger: Before starting a software project task that changes workflow assets
When implementing, validating, or updating project-governance workflow behavior

ask_user_question.evidence: Codex CLI headless target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11, but that read-only runtime check does not prove native AskUserQuestion.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Use the host conversation channel or block at interaction boundaries when no native AskUserQuestion tool is available.

sub_agent.evidence: Codex CLI headless target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11; Agent Team delegation remains host/tooling dependent and is not proven by the read-only E2E.
sub_agent.degraded_mode: Record degraded Agent Team evidence and require independent review evidence before product-code closure.

tool_calling.evidence: Codex CLI headless target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11; broader tool-use closure remains host-mode dependent.
tool_calling.degraded_mode: Treat tool use as host-mode dependent and require local validation commands for product closure.

browser.evidence: Browser automation is plugin/app dependent and not guaranteed by Codex CLI.
browser.degraded_mode: Use available Browser plugin or mark browser validation blocked.

mcp.evidence: MCP depends on configured servers in the host session.
mcp.degraded_mode: Prefer local scripts when MCP servers are unavailable and record the degraded path.

git_hooks.evidence: Workflow hooks are installed and validated in the local git repository.

workflow_closure.evidence: Codex CLI headless target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11; workflow closure remains degraded because several governance capabilities are host-mode dependent.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local Codex CLI command returned codex-cli 0.125.0; real Codex CLI headless target-cwd read E2E passed in project/e2e-test-project.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: codex exec -C . -s read-only --ephemeral "Read the local governance bootstrap and answer with exactly these machine-readable fields if the workflow is loaded: E2E_PLATFORM=codex; E2E_AGENT=<workflow role>; E2E_STAGE=<current stage>; E2E_MODE=<trigger x permission>. Do not modify files."
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Real codex exec target-cwd PASS from project/e2e-test-project with read-only ephemeral execution and machine-readable E2E_PLATFORM=codex, E2E_AGENT=Coordinator, E2E_MODE=always-on x default-confirm.
